semantic_sweep.review_note: Reviewed the complete chapter, all twenty-eight exact source mappings, two proof targets, four Lean declarations, research-backlog and new-paper-triage fixtures, every manifest atom, and every prose candidate. Made the Research Backlog Admission and Closure Contract the distinct owner; expanded 18/12/18/18; retained all repository artifacts without chapter-core effect; and froze the natural multi-researcher matched-workflow reproduction and transfer campaign.

scope.population: Exact research programs, sources or gaps, backlog items, access states, provenance classes, public-safety states, chapter boundaries, claims, proofs or experiments, deduplication decisions, evidence transitions, owners, actions, closures, consumers, environments, and times.
scope.environment: Twenty-eight mappings; split inventory, notes, and appendices; research-backlog and new-paper-triage fixtures; repository validators; two proof targets; four finite declarations. No citation-accuracy, literature-completeness, natural intake, research-quality, independent-reproduction, or transfer result.
scope.model: Research Backlog Admission and Closure Contract over freeze, inventory, separation, extraction, triage, assignment, execution, verification, closure, correction, retention, expiry, and successor continuity.
scope.authority: Owns research-backlog admission and closure only; source truth, citation authority, evidence promotion, chapter ownership, proof validity, experiment approval, privacy, rights, release, and external publication remain separate.
scope.time: Reviewed through 2026-07-15; material source, access, metadata, correction, retraction, chapter, claim, proof, experiment, consumer, environment, or time changes expire affected records.
scope.artifact: Chapter, manifest, twenty-eight mappings, source inventory and notes, generated appendices, backlog and triage fixtures, validators, two proof targets, four declarations, semantic review, and future campaign.

assumptions: Sources, gaps, provenance, access, public-safety state, chapter boundaries, claims, work, owners, decisions, closures, consumers, and expiry can be identified and versioned.
Unread, inaccessible, private, duplicate, rejected, failed, refuted, retired, and corrected items can remain visible without being laundered into support.
Matched research workflows can receive equal sources, access, tools, time, and review opportunity.
Independent researchers, reviewers, repositories, institutions, disciplines, legal regimes, languages, and time periods can reproduce outcomes.
chapter_defaults.strongest_counterclaim: The contract is elaborate research bureaucracy: reference managers, systematic reviews, evidence maps, issue trackers, wikis, ordinary bibliographies, or competent ad hoc research can achieve equal accuracy and closure with less burden.
chapter_defaults.falsifier: Matched natural research streams show no improvement in citation or decision accuracy, coverage, conflict discovery, correction, reproduction, closure, or chapter stability; excessive burden or false deferral; or no independent reproduction and transfer.

required_lanes.necessity: Position the contract against direct sources and strongest research-management comparators without inheriting results.
Justify access, privacy, rights, publication, evidence-transition, correction, and closure authority.
Specify finite source-ingestion and chapter-assignment gates without claiming citation or research quality.
Exercise intake, deduplication, assignment, blocking, correction, rejection, closure, expiry, and consumer propagation.
Measure accuracy, coverage, calibration, conflict and error discovery, time, closure, reproduction, burden, resources, and cost.
Ablate intake fields, provenance classes, passage binding, deduplication, transition gates, closure, and correction propagation.
Reproduce across researchers, models, repositories, institutions, disciplines, legal regimes, languages, and time.

contrary_evidence: Twenty-eight mappings and source notes establish traceability, not citation accuracy, completeness, research value, or claim truth.
The backlog and triage examples are synthetic, public-safe, hand-authored records.
All four Lean declarations reduce finite predicates over hand-authored source-ingestion or chapter-assignment records.
No natural intake stream, matched baseline, independent reproduction, or heterogeneous transfer has been run.
known_confounds: Researcher expertise, field familiarity, source access, incentives, tool familiarity, review effort, and repository maturity can dominate outcomes.
Outcome-aware source selection, queries, validators, baselines, stopping, corrections, and chapter decisions can bias the campaign.
Shared authors, models, tools, evaluators, organizations, or infrastructure can create false independence.
A complete backlog record can encode false metadata, passages, decisions, proofs, experiments, closures, or public-safety state.
acceptance_criteria: Bind exact program, source or gap, access, provenance, passage, assignment, claim, work lane, owner, blocker, decision, closure, consumer, environment, time, and non-claims.
Run natural research streams against matched strongest workflows with injected errors, conflicts, privacy pressure, retractions, failed reproduction, corrections, and rot.
Demonstrate accurate rejection, deferral, deduplication, correction, closure, expiry, and propagation across all consumers.
Promotion survives causal ablation, independent reproduction, and heterogeneous transfer with complete burden and cost.
narrowing_criteria: Narrow every result to exact program, corpus, field, researcher, model, tool, repository, institution, legal regime, language, environment, and time.
Separate inventory, access, reading, note, mapping, assignment, proof or experiment, reproduction, correction, closure, release, and publication.
Unknown citation accuracy, completeness, research quality, causal benefit, burden, reproduction, or transfer remains blocked.
refutation_criteria: Refute records with fabricated or stale metadata, unread-source support, provenance collapse, private leakage, invalid assignment, duplicate inflation, false closure, missed correction, or lost consumers.
Refute benefit when matched workflows perform equally or added bureaucracy, selection, weak attacks, hidden review, or omitted failures explains gains.

Refute literature completeness, citation accuracy, claim truth, chapter quality, reproduction, transfer, AGI, ASI, or SOTA from inventories, notes, mappings, fixtures, theorems, validators, or backlog size.
deprecation_criteria: Deprecate only after every source, note, mapping, backlog item, work artifact, decision, correction, residual, consumer, and successor state migrates with immutable lineage.

reproduction.command: python3 scripts/validate_protocol_examples.py && python3 scripts/validate_source_inventory.py && python3 scripts/validate_source_notes.py && python3 scripts/validate_claim_source_mappings.py && cd lean && lake build AsiStackProofs.BibliographyPlan
reproduction.environment_lock: Repository-local source records, fixtures, validators, and module current through 2026-07-15; natural matched research campaign not run.
reproduction.evaluator_identity: Repository-local; independent researchers, reviewers, repositories, institutions, disciplines, legal regimes, languages, and time periods required.

residual.next_unblocking_condition: Run a prospectively frozen natural research stream against matched strongest workflows with injected failures, complete accuracy, closure, correction, reproduction, burden and cost outcomes, causal ablations, independent reproduction, and transfer.

non_claims: No title, citation, source count, inventory row, source note, mapping, queue, fixture, theorem, validator, backlog size, or completed reading task establishes citation accuracy, literature completeness, research quality, claim truth, reproduction, transfer, AGI, ASI, or SOTA.
No natural matched multi-researcher campaign, independent reproduction, or heterogeneous transfer exists.
The argument-exit campaign is future work, not a result.

open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-pl.strongest_counterclaim: Ordinary research-management workflows match the benefits with less burden and fewer false deferrals.
open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-pl.falsifier: Natural matched research streams show no accuracy, coverage, conflict, correction, reproduction, closure, or stability benefit, unacceptable burden, or no transfer.

non_claims: The chapter core remains argument and its support-state effect is none.
Repository source discipline is not citation-accuracy, completeness, or research-quality proof.
Formal declarations enforce finite record boundaries and do not prove source interpretation or triage quality.
External comparators are lineage and do not certify the contract.
